title: aster germanicus
intro: Aster germanicus, also known as German tarragon or Eupatorium canadense, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. The medicinal properties of Aster germanicus include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. This plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Aster germanicus can be consumed as a tea, used in infusions, or applied topically in the form of ointments or salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
